narrative:
Circleville-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 423 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
